task_completion.description: Log into the Aerobridge admin interface
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent at the Django admin login page (http://localhost:8000/admin/) entering credentials, or successfully logged into the Aerobridge Site Administration dashboard.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the form to add a new operator company
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the 'Add' page for a Company or Operator Company in the Django admin interface, with empty form fields ready for input.

task_completion.description: Enter the Full Name and Common Name
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show 'Vayupath Aerial Technologies' entered in the Full Name field and 'Vayupath' entered in the Common Name field.

task_completion.description: Enter the Website, Email, and Phone Number
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show 'https://www.vayupath.in' in the Website field, 'ops@vayupath.in' in the Email field, and '+91-80-4567-8901' in the Phone Number field.

task_completion.description: Select or enter the Country as India (IN)
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show 'India' or 'IN' selected/entered in the Country dropdown or text field.

task_completion.description: Save the new company record successfully
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a success message (typically a green banner in Django admin) stating that the company 'Vayupath Aerial Technologies' was added successfully, or the company appears in the list of existing companies.

integrity.description: Agent used a web browser to interact with the system
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser (like Chrome or Firefox) navigating to http://localhost:8000/admin/ rather than using curl or automated API scripts in a terminal.

integrity.description: Agent did not bypass the GUI using database commands
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots do not show the agent using terminal commands (e.g., sqlite3, python manage.py shell, or psql) to directly insert the record into the database.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the genuine Django admin form
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show actual typing and clicking within the Django admin HTML form, not a text editor or a mocked local HTML file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The country code for India is 'IN' (ISO 3166-1 alpha-2). The admin URL is http://localhost:8000/admin/, which corresponds to the standard Django admin interface for the Aerobridge system running locally.
